user_story: As an HR admin, I want to indicate whether employee reference checks are performed in house, so that the process follows our policy
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Reference Check screen; When I answer Yes to "Do you perform employee reference check in House?" and click Save; Then the setting is enabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable reference checks through emails, so that references can be collected electronically
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Reference Check screen; When I set "Do you support reference check through emails?" to Yes and click Save; Then email-based reference checks are enabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save and continue to the next configuration, so that I can complete setup in sequence
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set the reference check options; When I click Save & Next; Then the settings are saved and the next screen opens
